rules.confidence_effect: high confidence when current source price or manager mark is available
rules.advisor_language: High-confidence records are the cleanest source for demo analytics, while still synthetic and not statement-grade.
Cash and money-market values are treated as high-confidence synthetic face-value records.

rules.confidence_effect: medium confidence when proxy treatment is documented
rules.advisor_language: Proxy-based values are usable for demo discussion but should be labeled as approximations.

rules.confidence_effect: low or unknown confidence depending on mark recency
rules.advisor_language: Private, stale, or manager-level marks should be called out when they affect the report conclusion.
Some records need human review before the result should be treated as meeting-ready.
Missing look-through can hide theme overlap and should be noted before relying on manager-level conclusions.
